tasks.label: EPDATA Prisma Status Generate
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate status; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx prisma generate

tasks.label: EPDATA Build Real Migration SQL
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script | Out-File -FilePath prisma/migrations/202607230001_add_foundation_pipeline_schema/migration.sql -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: EPDATA Apply Migrations
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate deploy; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx prisma generate

tasks.label: EPDATA Rewrite Migration SQL No BOM
args: Set-Location backend; cmd /c "npx prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script > prisma\migrations\202607230001_add_foundation_pipeline_schema\migration.sql"

tasks.label: EPDATA Resolve Failed Migration
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 202607230001_add_foundation_pipeline_schema

tasks.label: EPDATA Deploy Migrations Retry
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate deploy

tasks.label: EPDATA Rewrite Migration SQL ASCII
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script | Set-Content -Path prisma/migrations/202607230001_add_foundation_pipeline_schema/migration.sql -Encoding ascii

tasks.label: EPDATA Deploy Migrations Final
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate deploy; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx prisma migrate status; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx prisma generate

tasks.label: EPDATA Resolve and Reapply RLS Migration
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 202607230002_enable_rls_policies; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx prisma migrate deploy; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx prisma migrate status; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx prisma generate

tasks.label: EPDATA Reapply RLS After Column Fix
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 202607230002_enable_rls_policies; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx prisma migrate deploy; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx prisma migrate status; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx prisma generate

tasks.label: EPDATA Validate Table Count and RLS
args:
Set-Location backend; @"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS table_count
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema = 'public'
  AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE';
"@ | npx prisma db execute --stdin; @"
SELECT relname AS table_name, relrowsecurity AS rls_enabled
FROM pg_class
WHERE relname IN ('candidates','applications','screenings','reviews','decisions')
ORDER BY relname;
"@ | npx prisma db execute --stdin

tasks.label: EPDATA Run SQL Validation Queries
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma db execute --file scripts/sql/table-count.sql; npx prisma db execute --file scripts/sql/rls-status.sql; npx prisma db execute --file scripts/sql/fk-check.sql

tasks.label: EPDATA Load Test Indexes Final Output
EPDATA Load Test Indexes After Phone Fix
EPDATA Migrate Status
args: Set-Location backend; npx prisma migrate status

tasks.label: EPDATA Query Table and Columns
args: Set-Location backend; node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require('@prisma/client'); const prisma = new PrismaClient(); (async () => { const tableCount = await prisma.$queryRawUnsafe(\"SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS table_count FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_type='BASE TABLE'\"); console.log('TABLE_COUNT', JSON.stringify(tableCount)); const cols = await prisma.$queryRawUnsafe(\"SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type, is_nullable, column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name IN ('candidates','applications','screenings','users') ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position\"); console.log('COLUMN_SPOT_CHECK', JSON.stringify(cols, null, 2)); await prisma.$disconnect(); })().catch(async (e)=>{ console.error(e); await prisma.$disconnect(); process.exit(1); });"
